news.t: ProShares Launches First ETFs to Target 2x and -2x Daily Returns of Nasdaq-100 Mega Index

holdings.infoBox: QQUP is an equity ETF with a total of 13 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Proshares Ultra QQQ Mega ETF (QQUP) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Nasdaq-100 Mega index. The fund aims provide 2x the daily performance of the Nasdaq-100 Mega Index, using swap agreements. The index targets a narrow group of stocks that constitute the top 45% of the Nasdaq-100 Index by market capitalization QQUP was launched on Jun 10, 2025 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: ProShares Launches First ETFs to Target 2x and -2x Daily Returns of Nasdaq-100 Mega Index
data.text: BETHESDA, Md.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ProShares, the world's largest provider of leveraged and inverse ETFs, expands its lineup with products investing in top Nasdaq-100 companies.
